events.title: Mikael Healey’s Baby Grand: Construction Zone
events.description: If most jazz performances are carefully drafted blueprints, Construction Zone is the rare site where you can watch the building go up in real time. Pianist Mikael Healey and tenor saxophonist Aaron Mercado abandon setlists and rehearsed arrangements in favor of pure, in-the-moment composition—every note shaped by instinct, chemistry, and the audience itself. Centered around a white baby grand and intimate, in-the-round seating, the experience is as immersive as it is unpredictable. Healey, an internationally respected musical director with a star on the Palm Springs Walk of Fame, brings a refined sensibility; Mercado answers with bold, expressive improvisation. Tickets include dinner.

events.title: MANÁ New Show Added
events.description: Due to popular demand, Maná has announced they will play another show at Acrisure Arena on May 31, 2026. Now, fans have two chances to see them in the Greater Palm Springs Area: May 31 and September 26. Debido a la alta demanda, Maná ha anunciado que agregará otro concierto en el Acrisure Arena el 31 de Mayo de 2026. Ahora los fans tendrán dos oportunidades para verlos en el área del Greater Palm Springs: el 31 de Mayo y 26 de Septiembre. Iconic Mexican rock band MANÁ – celebrated worldwide for their boundary-breaking music and long-standing environmental advocacy – has announced an additional show Greater Palm Springs date on their massively successful Vivir Sin Aire Tour due to incredible fan demand. The newly added show will take place at Acrisure Arena on May 31, 2026, in addition to the previously announced show on September 26, 2026. La banda icónica de rock MANÁ—reconocidos a nivel mundial por su música que rompe barreras y su activismo medioambiental de larga trayectoria—ha anunciado una segunda fecha en Greater Palm Springs como parte de su exitoso Vivir Sin Aire Tour debido a la increíble demanda de los fans. El nuevo show se llevará a cabo en el Acrisure Arena el 31 de mayo de 2026, además del show previamente anunciado para el 26 de septiembre. TICKETS: Tickets for the newly added date will be available starting Friday, March 6 at 10 a.m. PT at Ticketmaster, the official ticketing provider of Acrisure Arena. BOLETOS: Los boletos para la nueva fecha estarán disponibles a partir de este viernes 6 de marzo a las 10 a.m. PT en www.ticketmaster.com The second leg of the Vivir Sin Aire Tour kicked off last week with sold-out shows at Belmont Park and in Brooklyn, setting the tone for another unforgettable run. The tour continues this Friday at MGM National Harbor in Washington, DC, before heading to Philadelphia, Costa Rica, and multi-night stops in Puerto Rico, Miami, and Anaheim, along with additional cities. La segunda etapa del Vivir Sin Aire Tour arrancó la semana pasada con presentaciones completamente agotadas en Belmont Park y Brooklyn, marcando el esperado regreso de esta memorable gira. El tour continúa este viernes en el MGM National Harbor en Washington, DC, y seguirá por Filadelfia, Costa Rica y fechas dobles en Puerto Rico, Miami y Anaheim, además de otras ciudades, extendiéndose hasta finales de noviembre. TICKETS: Tickets for the newly added dates will be available starting Friday, December 5 at 10am local time at mana.com.mx. events.description: Cherry Valley’s 123 Farm (located about 40 minutes from downtown Palm Springs) is home to probably the finest-smelling festival in SoCal. The months-long event includes farm tours, purple-hued photo ops, and tons of flower-infused treats, including lavender-marinated steak and lavender cheesecake and ice cream. You can also explore the farm’s sourdough bread hall, learn how lavender essential oils are distilled, and shop for lavender-scented personal care products.

events.title: Mikael Healey’s Baby Grand: Broken Broadway
events.description: Led by pianist Mikael Healey, this high-energy, audience-driven performance invites you to call out your favorite show tunes—only to hear them promptly deconstructed, reimagined, and set loose in entirely new forms. A ballad might swing, a power anthem may dissolve into a smoky lounge number, and a showstopper could veer into full improvisational chaos. Staged in an intimate, in-the-round setting with a white baby grand at its center, the experience is immersive, unpredictable, and never repeated. events.title: Weird Al Yankovic
events.description: “WEIRD AL” YANKOVIC THE BIGGER & WEIRDER 2026 TOUR Weird Al brings his legendary full-production multimedia comedy rock show back to the concert stage with the BIGGER & WEIRDER 2026 Tour, playing his iconic hits as well as some never-performed-live-before fan favorites. Al’s long-time band is joined by four additional players to create a super-sized concert experience. “Weird Al” Yankovic is the biggest-selling comedy recording artist in history. A 5-time Grammy Award winner, he is best known for his parodies of the biggest musical artists over the last 4 decades, including Madonna, Michael Jackson, Taylor Swift, Queen, U2 and Lady Gaga, all with their personal blessings. His many hits include “Amish Paradise,” “Eat It,” “Like a Surgeon,” “Smells Like Nirvana,” “Word Crimes,” and the platinum-selling “White & Nerdy.” His last album Mandatory Fun is the only comedy album in history to debut at #1 on the Billboard Top 200. Yankovic’s live shows have entertained audiences across the globe for generations, including appearances at such iconic venues as Radio City Music Hall, The Hollywood Bowl, Red Rocks, Carnegie Hall, Wolf Trap, The Kennedy Center and Madison Square Garden. In 2022, Yankovic produced and co-wrote the Emmy-winning biopic WEIRD: The Al Yankovic Story, starring Daniel Radcliffe in the title role. VIP Meet & Greet and Backstage Tour Packages are available for this show. Click here for more information on VIP packages. Special Guest: PUDDLES PITY PARTY Puddles Pity Party, the 7-foot sad clown whose golden voice is “comparable to any Grammy winner” (Los Angeles Times), has amassed over 900K YouTube subscribers and performed sold out shows around the globe including San Francisco’s Palace of Fine Arts, London’s Soho Theatre and a residency at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. He has performed on stage with such legends as Eric Idle, Nick Offerman, Jack Black, Maynard James Keenan and Primus. Puddles’ one-of-a-kind “textured voice laced with melancholy” (NY Times) has been hailed as “operatic” (Boston Globe) and his show both “life-affirming” (Herald Scotland) and “hysterically funny” (LA Weekly). events.description: Today, Disney Concerts, Disney+ and AEG Presents jointly revealed tour dates and on-sale information for the next “Worlds Collide Concert Tour” of North America coming to Acrisure Arena on September 25th, 2026, featuring stars from the “Descendants,” “ZOMBIES” and “Camp Rock” film franchises including Malachi Barton, Liamani Segura, Dara Reneé, Mekonnen Knife, Hudson Stone, Swayam Bhatia, Kiara Romero and Alexandro Byrd. This year’s “Worlds Collide Concert Tour” visits 48 arenas across the U.S., Canada and Mexico starting September 25th at Acrisure Arena in Palm Desert, CA and wraps on December 13th at Arena CDMX in Mexico City, MX. An exclusive Disney+ Perks presale will be available beginning Monday, March 23 at 10 am Local Time. Disney+ subscribers in the U.S. and Canada should visit www.Disneyplus.com/perks for more information*. The public on-sale will begin on March 27 at 10 am Local Time and various VIP packages including opportunities to be part of the tour’s cast Q&A will be available: www.WorldsCollideTour.com. Tickets can be purchased on Ticketmaster or by stopping by the Ticketmaster Box Office at Acrisure Arena.

events.title: MANÁ
events.description: Formed in 1986 in Guadalajara, Jalisco, MANÁ brought Spanish-language rock to the mainstream, blending classic rock, reggae, and pop with Latin rhythms. With 11 albums and over 50 million copies sold, an astounding 1.3 billion streams a year on Spotify and a remarkable 12.1 billion all time views on YouTube , MANÁ has set the standard for Latin rock. Formado en 1986 en Guadalajara, Jalisco, MANÁ llevó el rock en español al público mainstream, fusionando rock clásico, reggae y pop con ritmos latinos. Con 11 álbumes y más de 50 millones de copias vendidas, 1.3 mil millones de reproducciones al año en Spotify y la impresionante cifra de 12.1 mil millones de vistas acumuladas en YouTube, MANÁ ha establecido el estándar del rock latino. Their groundbreaking album Dónde Jugarán los Niños is the best-selling Latin rock album of all time. For nearly 40 years, the band’s tireless passion for live performances has taken them to over 30 countries, leaving behind a trail of unforgettable, history-making moments. Su innovador álbum Dónde Jugarán los Niños es el disco de rock latino más vendido de la historia. Durante casi 40 años, la incansable pasión de la banda por los shows en vivo los ha llevado a más de 30 países, dejando una estela de momentos inolvidables y trascendentales. Iconic Mexican rock band MANÁ—celebrated worldwide for their boundary-breaking music and long-standing environmental advocacy—has announced 19 new dates for the 2026 leg of their massively successful Vivir Sin Aire Tour. The newly added shows introduce fresh stops in Puerto Rico, Washington, DC; New Orleans; Palm Springs; Austin; and Anaheim (their first Anaheim performance in 10 years), along with returns to key markets including Denver, Phoenix, and Chicago. La icónica banda de rock en español MANÁ—celebrada en todo el mundo por su música innovadora y su larga trayectoria en defensa del medio ambiente—ha anunciado 19 nuevas fechas de su exitosísima gira Vivir Sin Aire para el 2026. Las fechas recién añadidas incluyen nuevas paradas en Puerto Rico (2 fechas), Washington, DC; Nuevo Orleans; Palm Springs; Austin; y Anaheim (su primera presentación en 10 años), y regresan a ciudades como Denver, Phoenix y Chicago. TICKETS: Tickets for the newly added dates will be available starting Friday, December 5 at 10am local time at mana.com.mx. ENTRADAS: Los boletos para las nuevas fechas estarán disponibles a partir del viernes 5 de diciembre a las 10 a.m. (hora local) en www.livenation.com The band will also add two more Los Angeles dates on September 18 and 19, 2026—their first-ever performances at the Intuit Dome—bringing their total LA shows on this tour to seven and marking an astonishing 47 Los Angeles arena performances overall. MANÁ currently holds the record for the most arena performances in Los Angeles history, recently surpassing Bruce Springsteen’s long-standing milestone. In addition, they will return to Houston’s Toyota Center, where they continue to hold the venue’s record for most performances by any artist. La banda también sumará dos fechas más en Los Ángeles, el 18 y 19 de septiembre del 2026—que serán sus primeras presentaciones en el Intuit Dome—llevando a un total de siete shows en LA durante esta gira y marcando un asombroso total de 47 presentaciones en arenas de Los Ángeles a lo largo de su carrera. MANÁ ostenta actualmente el récord de más presentaciones en arenas en la historia de Los Ángeles, superando recientemente el hito establecido por Bruce Springsteen. Además, regresarán al Toyota Center de Houston, donde continúan manteniendo el récord del artista con más presentaciones en ese recinto.

events.title: The Dinah
events.description: Founded in 1991 by Mariah Hansen and recently procured by longtime Dinah operations manager Bella Barkow and seasoned Dinah emcee and reality TV personality Rose Garcia, this weeklong extravaganza of star-studded pool parties and after-dark bashes is the biggest queer women’s event in the world, drawing more than 15,000 LGBTQ+ attendees to various locations in Palm Springs. Fondly called The Dinah (after the Dinah Shore golf championship it used to align with), it’s also a top-notch music festival in its own right — past Dinah headliners include now-legendary artists like Katy Perry, Lady Gaga, Meghan Trainor, Ke$ha, and 2025 Grammy winner Doechii.

events.title: The Phil Collins Story
events.description: The Phil Collins Story arrives at Fantasy Springs Resort Casino on Friday, Oct. 2 and traces the career of Phil Collins with a format that blends concert and documentary. The production moves from his chart-topping work with Genesis to his solo hits, using immersive storytelling, visuals, and live musicianship to bring the catalog into focus. Created by Dean Elliott, the show forms part of a 55-city North American tour.

events.title: 20th Anniversary Paint El Paseo Pink
events.description: Community, at its most effective, shows up. The 20th Anniversary of Paint El Paseo Pink invites the Coachella Valley to do exactly that—step by step—in support of Desert Cancer Foundation. More than a walk, the event channels collective effort into tangible impact, raising funds that provide critical financial assistance to local residents facing cancer. Since its founding, the foundation has helped more than 9,050 individuals, funding over $121 million in care. Participants can join individually or form teams, amplifying both awareness and support.

events.title: Bare at The Plaza Theatre
events.description: Pulitzer Prize-nominated photojournalist and filmmaker Robin Layton presents her newest book bare at The Plaza Theatre in Palm Springs. This immersive visual event celebrates the male body in all its humor, vulnerability, and beauty — featuring 150 stunning photographs set against breathtaking landscapes. Billboard Top Ten guitarist Todd Boston performs live in front of Robin’s artwork and videos, making for a one-of-a-kind evening of art, music, and raw human connection.

events.title: 90’s Corridos Tour
events.description: The 90’s Corridos Tour is bringing an unforgettable night of regional Mexican music to the desert this fall, with a stop in Palm Desert. This high-energy concert will feature legendary and fan-favorite performances from Lupillo Rivera, Jorge Gamboa, and many more special guests. Fans can expect a powerful celebration of 90’s corridos, combining classic storytelling, nostalgic hits, and the raw energy that defined an era of regional Mexican music. It’s set to be a must-see night for longtime fans and new listeners alike in Palm Desert.

At the VillageFest, you will experience a diverse array of artists, artisans, entertainers, and purveyors of fresh fruits and veggies, flowers, jewelry, snacks and sweets. Add all that to the great shops, restaurants, clubs, and entertainment venues located along World Famous Palm Canyon Drive – and the result is one of Southern California’s most popular weekly events: VillageFest!

location.address: 100 s. Palm Canyon Drive, Palm Springs, CA
